name: Mountain View Par Three Golf
about: Mountain View Par Three Golf is a 9-hole public golf course in Inman, South Carolina, offering a casual and welcoming environment for all skill levels. The course operates on a first-come, first-served basis, allowing for spontaneous play without the need for advance reservations. It is a small, accessible venue focused on providing a straightforward, no-frills golfing experience for local residents and visitors looking for a quick and affordable round.
why_golfers_like_it: No tee times required, perfect for spontaneous play
Affordable pricing with options for walking or riding
Offers club rentals, eliminating the need to bring your own equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a selection of clubs that players can borrow while playing the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The course is a 9-hole course, not an 18-hole course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the casual environment, lack of dress code, and affordable pricing make it suitable for families and juniors.
